title: Meta (Facebook Ads) Conversion Campaign Updates: What Advertisers Should Watch Going Into June
author: seogodyy
content: Meta (Facebook Ads) Conversion Campaign Updates: What Advertisers Should Watch Going Into June I wanted to share a few trends and platform changes that are having the biggest impact on conversion-focused campaigns. These observations are based on current Meta Ads features and advertiser experiences, not official announcements of future policy changes. 1. Meta Continues to Push AI-Powered Automation​Meta is investing heavily in automation through Advantage+ products. Many advertisers are seeing stronger results when allowing the system to optimize: Audience targeting Placements Budget allocation Creative delivery Manual campaign structures still have their place, but automated setups are becoming increasingly competitive. 2. Sales Objective Remains the Core Conversion Framework​The old "Conversions" objective has been integrated into Meta's broader Sales objective. Advertisers can optimize for conversions across: Website App Messenger WhatsApp Other supported destinations This simplifies campaign setup while giving Meta more flexibility for optimization. 3. Conversion API (CAPI) Is More Important Than Ever​Privacy updates and browser restrictions continue to reduce the reliability of browser-only tracking. For better data accuracy, advertisers should consider: Meta Pixel implementation Conversion API integration Proper event deduplication A stronger tracking setup generally improves optimization and reporting quality. 4. Value-Based Optimization Is Gaining Importance​Instead of optimizing only for the number of purchases or leads, many advertisers are shifting toward: Purchase value optimization ROAS-focused bidding High-value customer acquisition This approach can help businesses focus on profitability rather than volume alone. 5. Broad Targeting Continues to Perform Well​One trend that remains consistent is Meta's preference for broader audiences. Many advertisers report positive results by: Using fewer interest restrictions Expanding age ranges when appropriate Allowing the algorithm more freedom to find potential customers Of course, testing is still essential because performance varies by niche and market. 6. Creative Quality Matters More Than Targeting Tweaks​As automation improves, creative assets are becoming one of the biggest performance drivers. Popular formats include: Short-form videos UGC-style content Reels-focused creatives Dynamic creative testing Strong creative often delivers a greater impact than small audience adjustments. 7. Lead Quality Optimization Is Becoming More Sophisticated​For lead generation campaigns, Meta continues improving its ability to identify higher quality prospects. Advertisers may benefit from: CRM integrations Offline conversion tracking Lead feedback systems Better data helps the algorithm optimize toward leads that are more likely to convert into customers. Final Thoughts​The overall direction of Meta advertising is clear: more automation, stronger AI optimization, better first-party data usage, and increased emphasis on creative quality. Advertisers who adapt their tracking infrastructure, test broader audiences, and continuously improve creatives will likely be in a stronger position as the platform evolves. What changes have you noticed recently in your conversion campaigns? I'd be interested to hear other experiences and test results.

title: Is there any bot or script which can automate my whatsapp account warming strategy?
author: wakilla
content: Hi all, i hope everybody is well. I'm looking for some recommendations or any guide that can help with my problem. Currently i am manually warming up my whatsapp accounts. I inquire on property listings online, and then the agent will message me directly on the whatsapp. I talk to them a bit, and get them to save my number by saying i will be in contact with them in the near future to buy property. This makes the accounts much warmer for bulk sending. My question is though, can i automate this? Is there a bot or script that will click on the listings, inquire, and then message the agents for me? This would mean i could dramatically increase the number of accounts i can warm up at one time. Any ideas or suggestions would be greatly appreciated. Many thanks!
